origin.capability_match: offer Incentive tokens for their respective Reward Vault

security_gap.gap_description: A large number of incentive tokens offered may cause a denial of service due to computational limits.

actor_risk.description: The protocol might unintentionally or maliciously flood the Reward Vaults with a large amount of incentive tokens.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Offering extremely high numbers of incentive tokens may lead to DoS issues on the system.

assumptions: The smart contracts lack proper rate limiting or resource management for incentive token distribution.
There are no mechanisms to prevent the offering of excessive incentive tokens.

mitigation.strategy: Implement rate limiting and resource management mechanisms to prevent DoS attacks through incentive token distribution.

description: Protocol floods Reward Vaults with an extremely large amount of incentive tokens, leading to a Denial of Service.

trace_source.matched_capability: offer Incentive tokens for their respective Reward Vault
